arts.sum: Feyenoord defender Dávid Hancko has again insisted they will talk about his future in the summer, as he continues to be linked with a move to Liverpool. Soccer News cover comments from the defender today made to Algemeen Dagblad in which he again hints he’ll be on the move in the summer transfer window.
